description: Implement ledger routing and writer governance contract based on roadmap item 11. Create governance/ledger_router_contract.md to establish routing decisions, writer path protocols, and next actor governance rules for the ledger-based coordination system.
routing_decision_basis: Roadmap item 11 follows completed item 10 (Universal Executor/Auditor Exchange Ledger Loop). Multiple ACTION_COMPLETED events show ledger loop is operational, next governance contract layer is required.
